---
title: Illumina
date: 2026-01-01
published-title: Created
date-modified: last-modified
title-block-banner: "#212529"
---

## [Sequencing Basics](sequencing-basics.qmd)

Understanding the fundamentals of Illumina sequencing including clusters, flowcells, reads, lanes, indexing, quality scores, and file formats.

## [Illumina Sequencing Libraries](sequencing-libraries.qmd)

Detailed information about Illumina library structures including TruSeq Single Index, TruSeq Dual Index, and Nextera Dual Index libraries, plus the library sequencing workflow.

## [Illumina 5-base](illumina-5-base.qmd)

Overview of Illumina's 5-base methylation detection workflow.
